name: Mount Weymouth
legend: Dormant volcano. Height: 9567 ft.

name: Terez Hot Springs
legend: A geothermal springs with naturally heated water that provide relaxation and medicinal benefits. Average temperature is 77Â°F.

name: Aisin Creek of Luck
legend: This legendary water source is whispered about in ancient tales and believed to possess mystical properties. The spring emanates crystal-clear water, shimmering with an otherworldly iridescence that sparkles even in the dimmest light.

name: Charierolle â€” silver mining town
legend: Charierolle is a mining town of 6092 people just nearby the silver mine.

name: Koshkov Bridge
legend: A stone bridge spans over the Koshkov River near Ballin.

name: The Grey Wolverine
legend: A big and famous roadside inn. Delicious poached pork with blue kumis is served here.

name: The Beautiful Inn
legend: A big and famous roadside inn. Delicious syrupped bass with red absinthe is served here.

name: The Brave Lark
legend: A big and famous roadside inn. Delicious deep-fried peaches with bitter milk is served here.

name: The Prime Tavern
legend: A big and famous roadside tavern. Delicious smoked escallop with smoky liquor is served here.

name: The Amber Goose
legend: A big and famous roadside tavern. Delicious roasted olives with salty tea is served here.

name: The Orange Dog
legend: A big and famous roadside tavern. Delicious corned beans with red sap is served here.

name: Quean Lighthouse
legend: A lighthouse to serve as a beacon for ships in the open sea.

name: Svislavl Waterfall
legend: An impressive waterfall has cut through the land.

name: Jepsa Battlefield
legend:
A historical battle of the Niljalia-Kutiotanian War. 
Date: August 21, 386 Hacutonce Era.

name: Bieresch Battlefield
legend:
A historical battle of the Kusbachach Conquest. 
Date: December 4, 288 Hacutonce Era.

name: Haure Battlefield
legend:
A historical battle of the Palvilan Invasion. 
Date: November 29, 1963 Hacutonce Era.

name: Zafonti Battlefield
legend:
A historical battle of the Lanelean Invasion. 
Date: March 14, 313 Hacutonce Era.

name: Draxningdon Monster
legend: Journeying folk say a relic monster of 6 ft long inhabits Draxningdon Lake. Truth or lie, folks are afraid to fish in the lake.

name: Bostedmin Monster
legend: Old sailors tell stories of a gigantic sea monster inhabiting these dangerous waters. Rumors say it can be 38 ft long.

name: Horsfield Monster
legend: Old sailors tell stories of a gigantic sea monster inhabiting these dangerous waters. Rumors say it can be 22 ft long.

name: Gienvilles Dragon
legend: Inscriptions speak of a giant Dragon who inhabits Gienvilles hills and terrorizes the region.

name: Kohtka Forest
legend: A forest sacred to local Kaskog Religion.

name: Onsver Pinery
legend: A pinery sacred to local Norse Beliefs.

name: Hylakinen Bisons
legend: A gang of forest highwaymen.

name: Sulzheim Wolfs
legend: A gang of forest bandits.

name: Kusakos Cats
legend: A gang of forest brigands.

name: Jucourt Rooks
legend: A gang of forest bandits.

name: Pirates
legend: Pirate ships have been spotted in these waters.

name: Ruined Pyramid
legend: Ruins of an ancient pyramid. Untold riches may lie within.

name: Ruined Temple
legend: Ruins of an ancient temple. Untold riches may lie within.

name: Ruined Sacred site
legend: Ruins of an ancient sacred site. Untold riches may lie within.

name: Ruined Pyramid
legend: Ruins of an ancient pyramid. Untold riches may lie within.

name: Ninh Collection
legend: A vast collection of knowledge, including many rare and ancient tomes.

name: Travelling Extraordinary Circus
legend: Roll up, roll up, this extraordinary circus is here for a limited time only.

name: Travelling Wonderous Circus
legend: Roll up, roll up, this wonderous circus is here for a limited time only.

name: Nghia Contest
legend: Warriors from around the land gather for a contest of brutality in Nghia, with fame, fortune and favour on offer to the victor.

name: Sejnafi Fair
legend: A fair is being held in Sejnafi, with all manner of local and foreign goods and services on offer.

name: Minor Jetty
legend: A small location along the Son Nghia Brook to launch boats from sits here, along with a weary looking owner, willing to sell passage along the river.

name: Rooks migration
legend: A huge group of rooks are migrating, whether part of their annual routine, or something more extraordinary.

name: Setriconevi ball
legend: A ball has been organised at Setriconevi as a chance to gather the local elders of the area together to be merry, make alliances and scheme around the crisis.

name: Pinsk Pit
legend: The Pinsk Pit. Locals claim that it is slowly filling with lava.

name: Conere Sepulchre
legend: A foreboding necropolis perched atop a jagged cliff, overlooking a desolate wasteland. Its towering walls harbor restless spirits, and the imposing gates bear the marks of countless battles and ancient curses.
